claims.headline: Sharpens memory
claims.notesSentence: Studied as a dipeptide nootropic with neuroprotective effects on memory across multiple cognitive models.

claims.headline: Boosts BDNF & NGF
claims.notesSentence: Increased expression of brain-derived neurotrophic factor and nerve growth factor in the rat hippocampus.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Noopept BDNF and NGF study on PubMed
